items.headline: HHS Scrutiny And Primary Care Expansion Shape CVS Health Investor Questions
items.summary: The HHS Office of Inspector General highlights CVS Health's Medicare Advantage arm for high denial rates in post acute care, raising questions about senior access to services. CVS Health advances its primary care partnership with Mass General Brigham after clearing a key regulatory hurdle. Both developments focus attention on NYSE:CVS and its approach to care delivery, costs, and regulatory oversight.
